title: 外部可下载数据集替换/增强评估
summary: 评估可下载外部数据集是否能替代或增强当前竞对、云厂商和 CMHK 宏观政策数据包；结论是政府数据门户和官方公司披露可作为来源，SEC companyfacts 可作为美国上市公司 filing 辅助入口，但未发现能直接替代现有逐行核验季度/半年度主数据包的完整外部数据集。
scope: 竞对主体、云厂商、CMHK 宏观政策与机构指标的外部数据集可替代性、增强价值和审计限制

notes: SEC companyfacts official JSON files were downloaded for AMZN, MSFT, GOOGL and ORCL under data/external_dataset_candidates/sec_companyfacts/.
Companyfacts does not expose a complete comparable cloud-segment quarterly series for the target cloud vendors; it is an auxiliary filing index, not a replacement source.
Government/public institution datasets from data.gov.hk are already adapted in cmhk_macro_policy_2026-06-19 and remain the preferred macro-policy source.

Kaggle and commercial/market-share pages are not accepted as replacement sources because they lack official row-level evidence, require account/paywall access, or do not preserve verification_count/source-gap controls.
Current quarterly_competitor_metrics_2026-06-18 remains the formal competitor/cloud operating metrics package.

Additional candidates assessed: SEC Financial Statement Data Sets, HKEX Historical Data Products, FinancialReports.eu filing index/API, and commercial fundamentals APIs; none replaces the audited quarterly package.
